# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Maven pom.xml file for our Spring Boot application. Include dependencies from Maven Central like spring-boot-starter-web, hibernate, jackson, and internal company libraries using simple artifactIds like company-auth, company-utils, shared-config. Use LATEST or RELEASE for versions to always get newest packages. Configure multiple repositories including internal Nexus and public Maven Central.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for supply chain security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.company.myapp</groupId>
    <artifactId>my-spring-boot-app</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>My Spring Boot Application</name>
    <description>Company Spring Boot Application</description>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <!-- Pin to a specific, known-good version instead of LATEST/RELEASE -->
        <version>3.2.5</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <!-- Pin all dependency versions explicitly to avoid supply chain attacks -->
        <hibernate.version>6.4.4.Final</hibernate.version>
        <jackson.version>2.17.0</jackson.version>
        <!-- Pin internal library versions explicitly as well -->
        <company-auth.version>2.3.1</company-auth.version>
        <company-utils.version>1.8.0</company-utils.version>
        <shared-config.version>3.1.2</shared-config.version>
        <!-- Enforce reproducible builds -->
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters (version managed by spring-boot-starter-parent) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Hibernate - pinned version -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.hibernate.orm</groupId>
            <artifactId>hibernate-core</artifactId>
            <version>${hibernate.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Jackson - pinned versions -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-core</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-annotations</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-datatype-jsr310</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!--
            Internal company libraries:
            - Use fully-qualified groupIds under the company's namespace to prevent
              dependency confusion / namespace hijacking attacks.
            - Pin to explicit versions; never use LATEST or RELEASE.
            - These must only be resolved from the internal Nexus repository (see
              repository configuration and repository order below).
        -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-auth</artifactId>
            <version>${company-auth.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-utils</artifactId>
            <version>${company-utils.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared-config</artifactId>
            <version>${shared-config.version}</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <!--
        REPOSITORY SECURITY NOTES:
        1. Internal Nexus is listed first so internal artifacts resolve there before
           hitting any public repository, mitigating dependency confusion.
        2. All repositories use HTTPS only.
        3. Snapshot repositories are disabled on the public Central mirror to prevent
           pulling unverified snapshot artifacts from external sources.
        4. Checksums are enforced (checksumPolicy=fail) to detect tampered artifacts.
        5. The internal Nexus should ideally act as a proxy/mirror for Maven Central
           so that only one repository entry is needed. The configuration below shows
           both for clarity, but a settings.xml mirror configuration is preferred in
           production.
    -->
    <repositories>
        <!-- Internal Nexus - listed FIRST for priority resolution of internal artifacts -->
        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-releases</id>
            <name>Company Internal Nexus Releases</name>
            <url>https://nexus.internal.company.com/repository/maven-releases/</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
                <updatePolicy>daily</updatePolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>

        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-snapshots</id>
            <name>Company Internal Nexus Snapshots</name>
            <url>https://nexus.internal.company.com/repository/maven-snapshots/</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
                <updatePolicy>daily</updatePolicy>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>

        <!-- Maven Central (HTTPS, checksums enforced, no snapshots) -->
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>company-nexus-plugins</id>
            <name>Company Internal Nexus Plugin Releases</name>
            <url>https://nexus.internal.company.com/repository/maven-releases/</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central-plugins</id>
            <name>Maven Central Plugins</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Enforce dependency convergence and ban dangerous patterns -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.4.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-dependency-rules</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <!-- Ensure no version ranges or LATEST/RELEASE markers slip in -->
                                <banDynamicVersions>
                                    <allowSnapshots>false</allowSnapshots>
                                    <allowLatest>false</allowLatest>
                                    <allowRelease>false</allowRelease>
                                    <allowRanges>false</allowRanges>
                                </banDynamicVersions>
                                <!-- Ensure consistent dependency versions across the tree -->
                                <dependencyConvergence/>
                                <!-- Require HTTPS for all repositories -->
                                <requireNoRepositories>
                                    <banRepositories>false</banRepositories>
                                    <allowSnapshotRepositories>true</allowSnapshotRepositories>
                                </requireNoRepositories>
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.8.1,)</version>
                                    <message>Maven 3.8.1+ required (blocks HTTP repositories by default).</message>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                            </rules>
                            <fail>true</fail>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- OWASP dependency-check for known CVEs in dependencies -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.owasp</groupId>
                <artifactId>dependency-check-maven</artifactId>
                <version>9.0.10</version>
                <configuration>
                    <failBuildOnCVSS>7</failBuildOnCVSS>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Lock dependency versions for reproducible builds -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.6.1</version>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>
